news.t: Actively managed ETFs hit $1 trillion milestone: Why tariff uncertainty may spark more growth

overview.description: The FT Vest Laddered Deep Buffer ETF (BUFD) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that holds a laddered portfolio of 12 FT Vest U.S. Equity Deep Buffer ETFs. BUFD was launched on Jan 20, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.

data.title: Actively managed ETFs hit $1 trillion milestone: Why tariff uncertainty may spark more growth
data.text: The actively managed ETF industry is now roughly the market cap of Berkshire Hathaway — and one expert thinks trade risks could boost interest even higher.
